title: Magical Crisp Peruvian Shrimp Chupe De Camarones
description: A funky and crisp solo dinner Peruvian dish featuring shrimp stock and shio koji cure, flexitarian friendly in the form of chupe de camarones.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together shio koji and shrimp, letting it cure for 30 minutes.
In a large pot, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat and saute the onion until translucent.
Add the garlic and aji amarillo pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the shrimp stock and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the cured shrimp to the pot and cook until pink and fully cooked.
Stir in the lime juice and chopped cilantro.
In a small bowl, mix the cornstarch with 1 tablespoon of water and add it to the pot, stirring constantly.
Let the mixture cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
